metadata.title: pepe-y-su-perro
metadata.description: Flashcard deck for Spanish is fun - 1 chapter 7

sentences.original: Pepe, un muchacho de doce años, tiene un perro que se llama Lobo.
sentences.translation: Pepe, a twelve-year-old boy, has a dog named Lobo.

chunks.text: Pepe, un muchacho de doce años,
tiene un perro que se llama Lobo.

sentences.original: Lobo es un perro muy inteligente, y aprende rápidamente.
sentences.translation: Lobo is a very intelligent dog, and he learns quickly.

chunks.text: Lobo es un perro muy inteligente,
chunks.meaning: Lobo is a very intelligent dog,

sentences.original: Trabaja en un supermercado todos los días.
sentences.translation: He works in a supermarket every day.

sentences.original: Lobo quiere correr en el parque y espera a Pepe en casa.
sentences.translation: Lobo wants to run in the park and waits for Pepe at home.

chunks.text: Lobo quiere correr en el parque
chunks.meaning: Lobo wants to run in the park

chunks.text: y espera a Pepe en casa.
chunks.meaning: and waits for Pepe at home.

sentences.original: Cuando ve al muchacho, quiere salir a la calle.
sentences.translation: When he sees the boy, he wants to go out to the street.

chunks.meaning: he wants to go out to the street.

sentences.original: A las seis de la tarde, Pepe y Lobo entran en la casa.
sentences.translation: At six in the evening, Pepe and Lobo enter the house.

chunks.text: A las seis de la tarde,
Pepe y Lobo entran en la casa.
chunks.meaning: Pepe and Lobo enter the house.

sentences.translation: Lobo is hungry; he wants to eat.

sentences.original: Pepe saca una lata de comida para perro pero Lobo no está interesado.
sentences.translation: Pepe takes out a can of dog food but Lobo is not interested.

sentences.original: Pepe saca un pedazo de pollo y una hamburguesa pero el animal no quiere comer estas cosas tampoco.
sentences.translation: Pepe takes out a piece of chicken and a hamburger but the animal doesn't want to eat these things either.

chunks.text: Pepe saca un pedazo de pollo
chunks.meaning: Pepe takes out a piece of chicken

chunks.text: pero el animal no quiere comer estas cosas tampoco.
chunks.meaning: but the animal doesn't want to eat these things either.

sentences.original: Pepe come pizza y el perrro quiere un pedazo también.
sentences.translation: Pepe eats pizza and the dog wants a piece too.

chunks.text: y el perro quiere un pedazo también.
chunks.meaning: and the dog wants a piece too.

sentences.translation: (A dog that eats pizza? Is it possible?)

sentences.original: Finalmente Lobo come pizza y está contento.
sentences.translation: Finally Lobo eats pizza and is happy.

sentences.original: Luego, cuando Pepe prepara la tarea para la escuela, Lobo comprende que el muchacho necesita estudiar y espera con paciencia.
sentences.translation: Later, when Pepe prepares the homework for school, Lobo understands that the boy needs to study and waits with patience.

chunks.text: Luego, cuando Pepe prepara la tarea
chunks.meaning: Later, when Pepe prepares the homework

chunks.text: Lobo comprende que el muchacho necesita estudiar
chunks.meaning: Lobo understands that the boy needs to study
